BoCondition.description: One of the three cumulative BO conditions under Art. 4a pkt 29 CIT.

result.description: Binary result: PASS if condition is met, FAIL if not, UNCERTAIN if DDQ is insufficient
result.title: Result

BoCondition.title: BoCondition

BoPreliminary.description: Preliminary three-condition BO test result (Art. 4a pkt 29 CIT).

overall.description: FAIL if ANY single condition fails; UNCERTAIN if any condition is UNCERTAIN and none fail
overall.title: Overall

legal_basis.description: Cite the legal provisions assessed (Art. 4a pkt 29 CIT, MF Objaśnienia 2025)
legal_basis.title: Legal Basis

BoPreliminary.title: BoPreliminary

ConduitIndicator.description: A conduit red flag from MF Objaśnienia §2.2.1.

present.description: True if this red flag is present
present.title: Present

evidence.description: Evidence from DDQ supporting the assessment
evidence.title: Evidence

ConduitIndicator.title: ConduitIndicator

ConduitIndicators.description: Four conduit red flags from MF Objaśnienia §2.2.1.
ConduitIndicators.title: ConduitIndicators

EmployeeFactor.description: Extends SubstanceFactor with headcount (may be None if DDQ does not disclose).

present.description: True if this factor supports BO status
present.title: Present

note.description: Evidence from DDQ or explanation of absence
note.title: Note

count.description: Number of employees; null when DDQ does not disclose a number
count.title: Count

EmployeeFactor.title: EmployeeFactor

PhysicalOfficeFactor.description: Physical presence factor — own_premises distinguishes owned vs. rented office.

present.description: True if entity has a physical office
present.title: Present

own_premises.description: True if premises are owned or long-term leased
own_premises.title: Own Premises

PhysicalOfficeFactor.title: PhysicalOfficeFactor

SubstanceFactor.description: A single substance criterion from MF Objaśnienia §2.3.

present.description: True if this factor supports BO status
present.title: Present

note.description: Evidence from DDQ or explanation of absence
note.title: Note

SubstanceFactor.title: SubstanceFactor

SubstanceFactors.description: Six universal substance criteria from MF Objaśnienia §2.3.
SubstanceFactors.title: SubstanceFactors

SubstanceResult.description:
Full substance profile — mirrors TypeScript SubstanceResult interface.
Returned by POST /substance.

entity.description: Entity name as provided in the request
entity.title: Entity

entity_type.description: Archetypal entity classification derived from DDQ content
entity_type.title: Entity Type

substance_tier.description: STRONG: all six factors present, no red flags. ADEQUATE: most factors present, minor gaps. WEAK: significant gaps or some red flags. CONDUIT: entity appears to be a pass-through with minimal own substance.
substance_tier.title: Substance Tier

confidence.description: HIGH: DDQ explicitly covers all six substance factors and all three BO conditions. MEDIUM: most factors addressed but some gaps. LOW: DDQ is sparse or missing key evidence.
confidence.title: Confidence

source.description: Data source description (set by the extractor)
source.title: Source

SubstanceResult.title: SubstanceResult

DempeFunctions.description: DEMPE function descriptions extracted from DDQ.

development.description: Who directs R&D strategy and controls investment decisions?
development.title: Development

maintenance.description: Who maintains IP registrations and handles renewals?
maintenance.title: Maintenance

protection.description: Who enforces IP rights and manages litigation?
protection.title: Protection

exploitation.description: Who negotiates and signs licence agreements?
exploitation.title: Exploitation

DempeFunctions.title: DempeFunctions

DempeResult.description:
DEMPE analysis result — mirrors TypeScript DempeResult shape.
Returned by POST /dempe.

entity.description: Entity name as provided in the request
entity.title: Entity

ip_type.description: Type of intangible (brand, technology, patent, etc.)
ip_type.title: Ip Type

control_test.description: Assessment of whether the entity makes key DEMPE decisions. Format: 'PASS — ...' or 'FAIL — ...' with supporting evidence from DDQ.
control_test.title: Control Test

risk_bearing.description: Assessment of who bears IP development risk and exploitation risk
risk_bearing.title: Risk Bearing

beneficial_owner_dempe.description: Overall DEMPE-based BO conclusion (STRONG / MODERATE / WEAK) with explanation
beneficial_owner_dempe.title: Beneficial Owner Dempe

art12_scope_warning.description: CRITICAL flag: remind the reader to verify the treaty has an Art. 12 royalties article and that it covers this payment type. Mention the Art. 7 fallback.
art12_scope_warning.title: Art12 Scope Warning

source.description: Data source description (set by the extractor)
source.title: Source

DempeResult.title: DempeResult
